completion_summary: Restored visible right-side page-outline folding and added persistent H2 content-section folding with a cache-busted navigation asset. Task Lab now accepts an ignored local API-key file, reports only redacted credential status, publishes the exact spectrum payload supplied to each model decision, and renders measurement output separately from structured public model analysis. Verified with DeepSeek v4-pro: 27 events, 10 decisions, 3 spectrum-informed decisions, and complete public analysis fields. Validation: 1103 passed, 14 skipped; Ruff passed; strict MkDocs build passed; Chromium DOM validation mounted 2 outline controls and 4 section controls. Final implementation commit: 48afca8.
notes: The local api.md credential file remains Git-ignored and was never staged. Hidden chain-of-thought is neither requested for display nor retained; the UI exposes only structured public analysis fields.
scope: Secure the user-supplied API key file, restore collapsible document title navigation, and expose the spectra supplied to online agents together with their structured public spectrum interpretation and decision audit in Task Lab
